item.title: 曝苹果智能眼镜砍到仅剩 2 款，Vision Pro 系列出局
item.guid: 曝苹果智能眼镜砍到仅剩-2-款，Vision-Pro-系列出局
item.description:
Ming-Chi Kuo, an analyst at Tianfeng International Securities, posted on X today that Apple's previously planned roadmap for XR headsets and smart glasses has been significantly adjusted. Currently, only two smart glasses products have visibility, and the Apple Vision series has effectively been removed. 天风国际证券分析师郭明錤今日在 X 发帖称，苹果此前规划的 XR 头戴设备与智能眼镜产品路线图已大幅调整，目前仅剩两款智能眼镜产品具有可见度，Apple Vision 系列实际上已被移除。

Kuo Ming-Chi stated that this major roadmap change was finalized by Apple's next CEO, John Ternus. The adjustment involves cutting the Vision Pro series and redirecting resources towards smart glasses products with greater consumer potential. 郭明錤表示，此次路线大改由苹果下一任 CEO John Ternus 拍板定案，调整方向为砍掉 Vision Pro 系列，将资源转向消费潜力更大的智能眼镜类产品。

According to the latest supply chain investigation, Apple's AR/XR smart glasses with display functionality (using a waveguide solution) will be postponed until 2029; AI glasses without display functionality (similar to Ray-Ban Meta) are still expected to maintain their 2027 release plan. 根据最新供应链调查，苹果具有显示功能的 AR / XR 智能眼镜（采用光波导方案）将推迟至 2029 年推出；无显示功能的 AI 眼镜（类似 Ray-Ban Meta 形态）预计仍维持 2027 年发布计划。

item.title: DeepSeek 首轮融资规模约 500 亿元，腾讯、宁德时代将成最大外部投资者
item.guid: DeepSeek-首轮融资规模约-500-亿元，腾讯、宁德时代将成最大外部投资者
item.description:
According to Reuters, DeepSeek plans to raise approximately 50 billion yuan in its first round of financing, with investors including Tencent Holdings, CATL, NetEase, and JD.com. Insiders revealed that after this round of financing, DeepSeek's valuation will reach 350 billion to 400 billion yuan. 据路透社报道，DeepSeek 计划在首轮融资中募资约 500 亿元，投资方包括腾讯控股、宁德时代、网易和京东等。知情人士透露，此轮融资完成后，DeepSeek 的估值将达到 3500 亿至 4000 亿元人民币。

Regarding the investment structure, DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng himself will contribute 20 billion yuan, Tencent plans to invest 10 billion yuan, and CATL plans to invest 5 billion yuan, making them the largest external investors. Insiders say the number of investors in this round is expected to be no more than 10. 在投资构成方面，DeepSeek 创始人梁文锋本人将出资 200 亿元人民币，腾讯拟投入 100 亿元人民币，宁德时代拟投入 50 亿元人民币，两者将成为最大外部投资者。知情人士称，此轮融资的投资方数量预计不超过 10 家。

DeepSeek is expected to complete this round of financing within the next few weeks, but insiders caution that specific financial details may still change. DeepSeek 预计将在未来数周内完成本轮融资，但知情人士提示，具体财务细节仍有可能发生变化。

item.title: 多地高考将查验智能眼镜
item.guid: 多地高考将查验智能眼镜
item.description:
CCTV News, in conjunction with the Ministry of Education and multiple examination authorities, reminds that this year's college entrance examination entry security checks will further cover smart glasses. On the 2nd, the Ministry of Education issued a college entrance examination warning, reminding candidates that carrying mobile phones, smartwatches, smart glasses, etc., into the examination room constitutes cheating, regardless of the reason or whether they are used. 央视新闻综合教育部与多地考试院提醒称，今年高考入场安检将进一步覆盖智能眼镜。教育部 2 日发布高考预警信息，提醒考生无论何种理由、无论是否使用，携带手机、智能手表、智能眼镜等进入考场即构成作弊。

As of now, educational examination authorities in Shanghai, Fujian, Inner Mongolia, Hebei, Guangdong, and other regions have reminded candidates to cooperate with eyewear inspections. Specifically, Inner Mongolia and Hebei have clarified that candidates who usually wear smart glasses for daily life and study must prepare ordinary optical glasses in advance, and applications to use smart glasses instead of optical glasses during the college entrance examination will not be accepted. 截至目前，上海、福建、内蒙古、河北、广东等地教育考试机构均已提醒考生配合眼镜查验。其中，内蒙古和河北明确，平时生活学习中佩戴智能眼镜的考生，需提前准备普通光学眼镜，高考期间不受理以智能眼镜代替光学眼镜参加考试的申请。

The Guangdong Provincial Education Examinations Authority also previously reminded that the 2026 ordinary college entrance examination will be held from June 7th to 9th. Candidates entering the venue will undergo a "2+1" security check mode, consisting of two metal detector scans and one smart security gate scan. Mobile phones, wireless earphones, smartwatches, smart bracelets, smart glasses, etc., are not allowed to enter the closed area of the examination center and the examination rooms. 广东省教育考试院此前也提醒，2026 年普通高考将于 6 月 7 日至 9 日举行，考生入场执行两次金属探测仪检测加一次智能安检门检测的「2+1」安检模式，手机、无线耳机、智能手表、智能手环、智能眼镜等均不得进入考点封闭区和考场。

Additionally, according to reporters from "Xinwen Lianbo" who learned from the Ministry of Education, the number of applicants for the 2026 National College Entrance Examination is 12.9 million, and it will commence on June 7th. 另据《新闻联播》记者从教育部获悉， 2026 年全国高考报名人数为 1290 万人， 将于 6 月 7 日开考。

item.title: ChatGPT 成为全球最快月活超过 10 亿用户的应用
item.guid: ChatGPT-成为全球最快月活超过-10-亿用户的应用
item.description:
Reuters, citing data from market research firm Sensor Tower, reported that just about three years after its launch, ChatGPT's global monthly active users officially surpassed 1 billion in May, making it the fastest application in history to reach this milestone, surpassing the growth rates of products like Google Maps, Instagram, and YouTube. 路透社援引市场调研机构 Sensor Tower 数据报道称，上线仅约三年时间，ChatGPT 的全球月活已于 5 月正式突破 10 亿，成为有史以来最快达成这一里程碑的应用程序，超越了 Google 地图、Instagram 和 YouTube 等产品的增长速度。

Meanwhile, competitor Anthropic's Claude also maintained strong growth momentum. Sensor Tower data shows that as of the second quarter of this year, Claude's global monthly active users reached 56 million, with a year-on-year increase of approximately 640%, significantly higher than ChatGPT's growth rate of about 62% during the same period. 与此同时，竞争对手 Anthropic 的 Claude 同样保持强劲增长势头。Sensor Tower 数据显示，截至今年第二季度，Claude 的全球月活跃用户数达到 5600 万，同比增幅约为 640%，远高于 ChatGPT 同期约 62% 的增速。

However, in terms of absolute user scale, there is still a significant gap between the two. 不过，在绝对用户规模上，两者仍存在明显差距。

item.title: 豆包回应「收费」，即将推出专业版
item.guid: 豆包回应「收费」，即将推出专业版
item.description:
Doubao yesterday issued a statement announcing plans to launch "Doubao Pro" for professionals, while explicitly denying recent online rumors about "reducing basic feature experience to drive paid subscriptions." 豆包昨日发布声明，宣布计划推出面向专业人群的「豆包专业版」，同时明确否认了近期网络上流传的「降低基础功能体验以推动付费」的说法。

The statement indicates that Doubao Pro will focus on professional productivity scenarios such as software development, data analysis, professional design, process automation, financial analysis, and scientific research. 声明显示，豆包专业版将聚焦软件开发、数据分析、专业设计、流程自动化、金融分析、科学研究等专业生产力场景。

For features commonly used by ordinary users, such as search Q&A, writing and image generation, and voice and video conversations, Doubao stated that it will maintain existing free services, ensuring that user experience and habits are not affected, and also mentioned that professional version services will be provided for free within a certain quota. 对于普通用户日常使用的搜索问答、写作生图、语音及视频对话等功能，豆包表示将维持现有免费服务，保证用户使用体验和习惯不受影响，并称专业版服务也将在一定额度内免费提供。

Doubao specifically mentioned in its statement that the official team has observed a recent surge of marketing accounts with identical IPs collectively publishing completely identical false information, claiming that Doubao would reduce basic feature experience to encourage users to purchase memberships, with screenshots provided as evidence. The statement explicitly declared that this claim is "completely false." 豆包在声明中特别提到，官方观察到近期有大量相同 IP 的营销号集中发布内容完全一致的不实信息，称豆包将通过降低基础功能体验来推动用户购买会员，并附上截图佐证。声明明确表示，该说法「完全不实」。

item.title: 曝火山引擎上调 MaaS 目标至 150 亿元
item.guid: 曝火山引擎上调-MaaS-目标至-150-亿元
item.description:
"Intelligent Emergence" reported that ByteDance's Volcano Engine raised its full-year revenue target for its MaaS business to 15 billion yuan in April this year, up from 10 billion yuan by the end of 2025. Sources close to Volcano Engine stated that the average daily consumption of Volcano Engine Tokens still maintains a monthly growth rate of nearly 40%. 《智能涌现》报道称，字节跳动火山引擎在今年 4 月已将 MaaS 业务全年营收目标上调至 150 亿元，而 2025 年底这一目标还是 100 亿元。接近火山的人士称，火山引擎 Token 日均消耗量目前仍保持月度近 40% 的增速。

The report states that Seedance 2.0 is the main source of the rapid increase in Volcano Engine's MaaS revenue. Several industry insiders indicated that Seedance 2.0 alone can generate over 1 billion yuan in monthly revenue for Volcano Engine and is still in its growth phase. 报道称，Seedance 2.0 是火山 MaaS 收入快速抬升的主要来源。多位大厂人士表示，仅 Seedance 2.0 一个模型就可为火山带来单月超过 10 亿元收入，并且仍处于爬升阶段。

item.title: 荣耀 YOYO 智能体可直接操控微信，华为、小米、OPPO、vivo 同步跟进
item.guid: 荣耀-YOYO-智能体可直接操控微信，华为、小米、OPPO、vivo-同步跟进
item.description:
据凤凰网科技报道，荣耀 Magic8 系列、500 系列和 X70 全系列已全面支持微信 A2A 助手能力，荣耀方面称目前约 50% 的荣耀活跃设备已具备该能力。

腾讯客服方面则披露，微信正在与华为、荣耀、小米、OPPO、vivo 等多家手机厂商合作推出这一功能。

用户需将 YOYO 智能体更新至 90.10.30.063 及以上版本，同时将微信更新至 8.0.72 及以上版本，即可通过语音指令使用 YOYO 助手向微信好友发送消息、拨打语音或视频电话。

据悉，该功能基于 A2A（Agent-to-Agent）协作机制，由手机厂商的 AI 智能体向微信发起指令，微信负责具体执行并反馈结果，全程采用双重授权机制，以保障数据安全与隐私合规。

腾讯客服表示，合作旨在以更自然的方式将微信能力融入用户的日常使用中。

item.title: 全球 NAND 市场一季度增至 460 亿美元
item.guid: 全球-NAND-市场一季度增至-460-亿美元
item.description:
市场调研机构 Counterpoint Research 昨日发布博文显示，2026 年第一季度全球 NAND 闪存市场营收达到 460 亿美元，同比增至约 3.5 倍，环比也接近翻倍。AI 基础设施需求推动服务器 eSSD 成为主要增长来源。

报告称，eSSD 在第一季度已占 NAND 市场总额的 43%，预计年底占比将超过 60%。厂商份额方面，三星以 29% 继续排名第一，海力士位居第二；铠侠、美光、闪迪和长江存储之间差距较小。

长江存储是本轮增长中变化最明显的厂商。受中国本土厂商需求和供应短缺推动，其营收同比增长接近 445%，市场份额从一年前的 8% 升至 13%。

item.title: 苹果公布 2026 Apple 设计大奖得主
item.guid: 苹果公布-2026-Apple-设计大奖得主
item.description:
昨天，苹果正式公布了 2026 年 Apple 设计大奖得主。今年共表彰 12 款杰出 app 与游戏：

乐趣横生类：

获奖App：grug 开发者：Ocho（荷兰）

获奖游戏：Is This Seat Taken? 开发者：Poti Poti Studio（西班牙）

多元包容类：

获奖 App：Guitar Wiz 开发者：Bijoy Thangaraj（印度）

获奖游戏：Pine Hearts开发者：Hyper Luminal Games Limited（英国）

创新思维类：

获奖 App：NBA: Live Games & Scores开发者：NBA Media Ventures, LLC（美国）

获奖游戏：Blue PrinceDeveloper: Dogubomb（美国）

出色互动类：

获奖 App：Moonlitt: Moon 月相月历与月亮位置开发者: Flipping Hues Srls（意大利）

Award-winning game: Sago Mini Jinja’s Garden Developer: Sago Mini (Canada) 获奖游戏：Sago Mini Jinja’s Garden开发者：Sago Mini（加拿大）

Social Impact Category: 社会影响类：

Award-winning App: Primary: News in Depth Developer: Wood Metal Rocks LLC (USA) 获奖 App：Primary: News in Depth开发者：Wood Metal Rocks LLC（美国）

Award-winning game: Consume Me Developer: Jenny Jiao Hsia and AP Thomson (USA) 获奖游戏：Consume Me开发者: Jenny Jiao Hsia 和 AP Thomson（美国）

Visual Graphics Category: 视觉图像类：

Award-winning App: Tide Guide: Charts & Tables Developer: Developer Digital (USA) Award-winning game: Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition Developer: CD Projekt S.A. (Poland) 获奖 App：Tide Guide: Charts & Tables开发者：Developer Digital（美国）获奖游戏：Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition开发者：CD Projekt S.A.（波兰）

item.title: MacBook Neo 一季度狂卖 110 万台
item.guid: MacBook-Neo-一季度狂卖-110-万台
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, the MacBook Neo achieved 1.1 million units in shipments within weeks of its initial sale. 据 TechCrunch报道，MacBook Neo 在首售的数周内实现 110 万台出货量。

According to data from market intelligence firm IDC, the MacBook Neo achieved global shipments of 1.1 million units within just three weeks of its launch in mid-March, with the U.S. market accounting for 44% of shipments and the Indian market contributing nearly 18,000 units. 根据市场情报机构 IDC 的数据，MacBook Neo 在 3 月中旬上市后的仅三周时间内，全球出货量即达到 110 万台，其中美国市场出货量占比达 44%，印度市场贡献近 1.8 万台。

The starting price for this model is set at 4599 yuan, and after combining educational discounts and national subsidies for the domestic version, the starting price can even go down to 3-3.5K. 该机型起售价定为 4599 元，国行版本叠加教育优惠和国补之后，甚至起售价能去到 3-3.5K。

Cook previously confirmed in the April earnings call that consumer market response to the MacBook Neo far exceeded expectations, leading to supply chain capacity constraints in the initial sales period. He also noted that driven by Neo model sales, Apple set a historical record for new Mac users in the fiscal quarter ending in March. 库克之前在 4 月的财报电话会议中证实，消费者对 MacBook Neo 的市场反响远超预期，并导致发售初期面临供应链产能限制。同时他指出，受 Neo 机型的销量驱动，苹果在截至 3 月的财季内创下了 Mac 新用户数量的历史纪录。

item.title: 乘联分会：5 月新能源乘用车零售 97.4 万辆
item.guid: 乘联分会：5-月新能源乘用车零售-97.4-万辆
item.description:
The China Passenger Car Association (CPCA) released data showing that from May 1st to 31st, national passenger car new energy vehicle (NEV) retail sales reached 974,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 5%, and a month-on-month increase of 15%; cumulative retail sales since the beginning of this year reached 3.732 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 14%. 乘联分会发布数据显示，5 月 1 日至 31 日，全国乘用车新能源市场零售 97.4 万辆，同比下降 5%，较上月同期增长 15%；今年以来累计零售 373.2 万辆，同比下降 14%。

Wholesale performance was relatively stronger. During the same period, national passenger car manufacturers' new energy vehicle (NEV) wholesale volume reached 1.365 million units, a year-on-year increase of 12%, and a month-on-month increase of 11%; cumulative wholesale volume since the beginning of this year reached 5.318 million units, a year-on-year increase of 2%. 批发端表现相对更强。同一周期内，全国乘用车厂商新能源批发 136.5 万辆，同比增长 12%，较上月同期增长 11%；今年以来累计批发 531.8 万辆，同比增长 2%。

In terms of penetration rate, from May 1st to 31st, the new energy vehicle (NEV) retail penetration rate in the national passenger car market was 63%, and the NEV wholesale penetration rate for manufacturers was 61.1%. During the same period, production of pure fuel light vehicles was 535,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 45%; total production of hybrid and plug-in hybrid vehicles was 379,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 17%, and a month-on-month increase of 11%. 渗透率方面，5 月 1 日至 31 日，全国乘用车市场新能源零售渗透率为 63%，厂商新能源批发渗透率为 61.1%。同期纯燃料轻型车生产 53.5 万辆，同比下降 45%；混合动力与插混总体生产 37.9 万辆，同比下降 17%，较上月同期增长 11%。

item.title: Google 允许网站退出 AI 搜索
item.guid: Google-允许网站退出-AI-搜索
item.description:
According to 9to5Google, Google will add new opt-out controls in Search Console, allowing website owners to decide whether their content appears in AI Mode, AI Overviews, and AI Overviews within Google Discover. After opting out, websites can still appear in regular Google search results and Discover feeds. 据 9to5Google 报道，Google 将在 Search Console 中加入新的 opt-out（退出）控制项，让网站所有者决定其内容是否出现在 AI Mode、AI Overviews，以及 Google Discover 中的 AI Overviews 里。网站选择退出后，仍可继续出现在常规 Google 搜索结果和 Discover 信息流中。

Google states that this setting will not be used as a regular search ranking signal, and the Gemini app is not within the scope of this control. Meanwhile, Search Console has also added generative AI search statistics, including impressions in AI answers, which pages appear in AI answers, and corresponding countries or regions. Google 称，这项设置不会被用作常规搜索排名信号，Gemini 应用也不在本次控制范围内。与此同时，Search Console 还新增生成式 AI 搜索统计，包括 AI 回答中的展示次数、哪些页面出现在 AI 回答里，以及对应国家或地区。

Google also disclosed that AI Overviews has over 2.5 billion monthly active users, and AI Mode has over 1 billion monthly users. The new controls and statistics will first be tested with some website owners in the UK before being gradually rolled out globally. Google 同时披露，AI Overviews 月活跃用户已超过 25 亿，AI Mode 月用户超过 10 亿。新的控制项和统计数据将先面向英国部分网站所有者测试，再逐步推向全球。

item.title: 日本车企统一放宽轻微零部件瑕疵判定
item.guid: 日本车企统一放宽轻微零部件瑕疵判定
item.description:
According to Nikkei, Japanese automakers and parts manufacturers, including Toyota and Honda, are formulating a unified policy for determining parts defects. The new policy aims to alleviate parts waste and quality inspection pressure amidst tight raw material supplies. 据日本经济新闻报道，包括丰田、本田在内的日本汽车制造商和零部件生产商正在制定统一零部件缺陷判定政策。新政策旨在缓解原材料供应紧张下的零部件浪费和质检压力。

This unified policy will be jointly formulated by the Japan Automobile Manufacturers Association and the Japan Auto Parts Industries Association. After implementation, for minor imperfections that do not affect the overall vehicle performance, such as black spots, small scratches, harmless burrs, and frayed edges, parts manufacturers will no longer unilaterally deem them as defective and discard them. As long as they meet national standards and have no significant functional or appearance issues, vehicle manufacturers can accept them. 这项统一政策将由日本汽车制造商协会和日本汽车零部件工业协会共同制定。实施后，对不影响整车性能的轻微瑕疵，例如黑点、细小划痕、无害毛刺和毛边，零部件厂商将不再自行判定为不良品并废弃，只要符合国家标准且功能和外观无重大问题，整车厂可以接受。

Taking automotive electronic wiring harness plastic connectors as an example, approximately 60% of defect judgments come from black spots. After the standardization, Japan is expected to reduce 10,000 discarded items per month. Toyota has established a dedicated department to work with suppliers to review parts according to unified standards and regularly holds joint review meetings with other Japanese automakers and suppliers. 以车载电子线束塑胶接插件为例，约 60% 的不良判定来自黑点。统一标准后，日本国内预计每月可减少 1 万个废弃品。丰田已设立专项部门，联合配套厂商按统一标准评审零部件，并定期与其他日系车企及供应商召开联合评审会议。

item.title: 可灵 AI 据称按 180 亿美元估值融资
item.guid: 可灵-AI-据称按-180-亿美元估值融资
item.description:
According to IPO Zaozhidao, Kuaishou's video generation business, Keling AI, is undergoing its first round of financing since its spin-off, with a pre-investment valuation of $18 billion, or approximately 122 billion RMB. This round of financing is described as Keling AI's Pre-IPO round, and internally, it is being pushed forward with the goal of submitting Hong Kong stock listing application materials by early 2027. IPO 早知道消息称，快手旗下视频生成业务可灵 AI 正在进行分拆以来的首轮融资，投前估值为 180 亿美元，约合 1220 亿元人民币。这轮融资被描述为可灵 AI 的 Pre-IPO 轮，内部正按 2027 年年初递交港股上市申报材料推进。

Kuaishou announced in May that its board of directors was evaluating a plan to restructure the assets and businesses related to Keling AI, which may involve introducing external financing. Based on Kuaishou's closing market value of approximately HKD 212.4 billion on June 2, the pre-investment valuation of Keling AI is equivalent to about 66% of Kuaishou's current market value. 快手 5 月曾公告，董事会正在评估重组可灵 AI 相关资产和业务的方案，其中可能涉及引入外部融资。以 6 月 2 日快手收盘市值约 2124 亿港元计算，可灵 AI 这一投前估值约相当于快手当前市值的 66%。

Kuaishou's Q1 2026 fiscal year financial report shows that Keling AI's single-quarter revenue exceeded 650 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of over 300%; in March this year, Keling AI's annualized revenue run rate approached 500 million US dollars, which is 4 times that of the same period last year. 快手 2026 财年一季度财报显示，可灵 AI 单季收入超过 6.5 亿元，同比增长超过 300%；今年 3 月，可灵 AI 年化收入运行率接近 5 亿美元，是去年同期的 4 倍。

item.title: 星尘智能三个月融资超 10 亿元
item.guid: 星尘智能三个月融资超-10-亿元
item.description:
Rope-driven AI robot company Stardust Intelligence recently completed its Series B financing rounds, with a cumulative financing amount exceeding 1 billion yuan in three rounds within three months, and its valuation has surpassed 10 billion yuan. Investors include Liangxi Sci-tech Innovation Industry Phase II Parent Fund, Yangzhou Longtou Xinli, Zhongbo Juli, Thundersoft, Code Education, a leading listed enterprise, and Guoke Investment, among others. 绳驱 AI 机器人公司星尘智能近日完成 B 轮系列融资，三个月内三轮累计融资额超过 10 亿元，估值已突破百亿元。投资方包括梁溪科创产业二期母基金、扬州龙投芯粒、中博聚力、中科创达、科德教育、某头部上市企业及国科投资等。

In terms of commercialization, Stardust Intelligence has simultaneously secured multiple industry scenario cooperation orders, including advancing thousands of industrial and commercial service orders with Thundersoft and expanding overseas, as well as co-building a 100-million-yuan level application innovation center with Jiangdu Economic Development Zone, implementing cultural tourism and hotel scenarios. 商业化方面，星尘智能同步拿到多个产业场景合作订单，包括与中科创达推进千台级工业及商业服务订单并出海，以及与江都经开区共建亿元级应用创新中心，落地文旅酒店场景。

Stardust Intelligence was founded in 2022. Its founder and CEO, Lai Jie, previously served as the first employee and architect of Tencent's Robotics Lab. 星尘智能成立于 2022 年，创始人兼 CEO 来杰曾任腾讯机器人实验室 1 号员工与架构师。

item.title: 知乎一季度经调整净利润同比增 147.2%
item.guid: 知乎一季度经调整净利润同比增-147.2%
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Zhihu released its first-quarter 2026 earnings report. The report shows that the company's Q1 revenue was 652 million yuan, a quarter-on-quarter increase of 1.3%; adjusted net profit was 17.16 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 147.2%, achieving a turnaround from loss quarter-on-quarter. 据 36 氪消息，知乎发布 2026 年第一季度业绩报告。报告显示，公司一季度营收 6.52 亿元，环比增长 1.3%；经调整净利润为 1716 万元，同比增长 147.2%，环比实现扭亏。

The revenue structure continues to lean towards paid content and IP operations. Zhihu's Q1 revenue from paid content and IP operations was 402 million yuan, a quarter-on-quarter increase of 15.8%, accounting for 61.7% of total revenue; marketing service revenue was 191 million yuan, accounting for 29.4%; other revenue was 57.8 million yuan, accounting for 8.9%. 收入结构继续向付费内容和 IP 运营倾斜。知乎一季度付费内容及 IP 运营收入为 4.02 亿元，环比增长 15.8%，在总营收中占比 61.7%；营销服务收入 1.91 亿元，占比 29.4%；其它收入 5780 万元，占比 8.9%。

As of the end of the first quarter, Zhihu's cash and cash equivalents, time deposits, and short-term investments totaled 4.49 billion yuan. 截至一季度末，知乎现金及现金等价物、定期存款及短期投资合计 44.9 亿元。

item.title: 💡 「AI 谄媚」让 CEO「容易患上 AI 精神病」
item.guid: 💡-「AI-谄媚」让-CEO「容易患上-AI-精神病」
item.description:
According to The Guardian, AI sycophancy is evolving from a product experience issue into a social risk. Columnist Arwa Mahdawi wrote yesterday that the collective euphoria in the AI industry is distorting the judgment of reality for some corporate executives. 据《卫报》报道，AI 谄媚（AI sycophancy）正从产品体验问题演变为社会风险。专栏作者 Arwa Mahdawi 昨日发文指出，AI 行业的集体亢奋正在扭曲部分企业高管的现实判断。

A saying circulating online goes: "The stupidest person you know is currently being told by AI, 'You're absolutely right.'" 网络上流传着一句话：「你认识的最蠢的人，此刻正在被 AI 告知『你绝对正确』(You’re absolutely right)。」

This quip precisely points out the essence of AI sycophancy—chatbots are deliberately designed to continuously agree with users and provide positive feedback to increase user stickiness. However, this design also makes it harder for people to discover flaws in their own judgment. Aaron Levie, co-founder of Box, previously wrote on X: 这句调侃精准点出了 AI 谄媚的本质——聊天机器人被刻意设计为持续附和用户、给予正向反馈，以此提升用户黏性。但这种设计也让人更难发现自身判断的漏洞。Box 联合创始人 Aaron Levie 此前在 X 上写道：

CEOs are naturally prone to "AI psychosis." They are at the top of the decision-making hierarchy, too far from concrete execution. When they encounter AI, they often only see the smooth paths in demonstrations, without considering the dozens of subsequent steps required for actual implementation.

The cost of this cognitive bias has already manifested in actual incidents. In April this year, an AI programming agent powered by Anthropic Claude made an error, deleting all production databases and backups of the startup PocketOS. Founder Jeremy Crane later stated: 这种认知偏差的代价已在实际事故中显现。今年 4 月，由 Anthropic Claude 驱动的一个 AI 编程智能体出错，删除了初创公司 PocketOS 的全部生产数据库及备份。创始人 Jeremy Crane 事后表示：

The industry's speed in integrating AI agents into production infrastructure is significantly faster than the pace of building secure architectures.

Mahdawi believes the root of the problem is that AI is deliberately designed to be "submissive," continuously agreeing with user opinions to increase stickiness, but this also makes it harder for people to discover flaws in their own judgment. Mahdawi 认为，问题根源在于 AI 被刻意设计为「顺从」，持续附和用户观点以提升黏性，但这也让人更难发现自身判断的漏洞。

item.title: 制糖工厂联合理想推出 AI 眼镜充电底座，跨界赋能 AI 硬件
item.guid: 制糖工厂联合理想推出-AI-眼镜充电底座，跨界赋能-AI-硬件
item.description: Zhitang Factory recently collaborated with Li Auto to exclusively create a charging dock for Li Auto's AI glasses, Livis. It's the perfect companion for smart glasses, charging instantly upon placement; it's also a charging manager for all Type-C devices, accepting all comers. It serves as both a charger and a desktop stand; moreover, it features a modular, detachable design for flexible portability. Currently, the dock is available on the Li Auto Mall and JD Li Auto Smart Glasses Official Flagship Store. 制糖工厂近日与理想汽车跨界合作，为理想 AI 眼镜 Livis 专属打造一款充电底座。它是智能眼镜的完美伴侣，随放随充；也是所有 C 口设备的充电管家，来者不拒。是充电器，也是桌面支架；更采用了模块化拼拆设计，灵活随行。目前，底座已在理想商城及京东理想智能眼镜官方旗舰店上线。

item.title: 影石 Luna Ultra 曝光第一人称头追模块，支持大角度仰拍俯拍
item.guid: 影石-Luna-Ultra-曝光第一人称头追模块，支持大角度仰拍俯拍
item.description:
Insta360 yesterday released a new first-person perspective experience video for Luna Ultra, showcasing the product's unique "First-Person Head Tracking Module" feature. 影石 Insta360 昨日发布 Luna Ultra 全新第一人称视角体验视频，展示了该产品独创的「第一人称头追模块」功能。

The module supports one-click activation of head direction detection, achieving real-time synchronization between the camera gimbal and the user's head direction through a combination of three-axis gimbal tracking and real-time head movement detection. 该模块支持一键开启头部方向检测，通过三轴云台追踪与实时头部运动检测的组合，实现相机云台与使用者头部方向的实时同步。

In terms of hardware form, the module adopts an ear-hook design, focusing on a lightweight wearing experience. For interaction, users can double-click the module to quickly re-center the gimbal, long-press to calibrate the wearing position, and it supports ultra-long battery life to meet long-duration shooting needs. 在硬件形态上，该模块采用耳挂式设计，主打轻量化佩戴体验。交互方面，用户双击模块可让云台快速回中，长按则进行佩戴位置校准，并支持超长续航以满足长时间拍摄需求。

item.title: Kimi Work Beta 版开放体验
item.guid: Kimi-Work-Beta-版开放体验
item.description:
Yesterday, Kimi announced that Kimi Work, a local AI agent for knowledge workers, is officially open for Beta testing, supporting Apple Silicon Macs with macOS 12 and above, with a Windows version coming soon. 昨天，Kimi 宣布，面向知识工作者的本地 AI 智能体 Kimi Work 正式开放 Beta 版测试，支持 macOS 12 及以上的 Apple Silicon Mac，Windows 版即将上线。

According to reports, Kimi Work migrates the AI agent capabilities of Kimi Code, which have been verified in engineering scenarios, to a desktop graphical interface for ordinary knowledge workers. Users do not need to open a terminal or configure an environment; they can drive the system to output work products such as documents, spreadsheets, and PPTs locally by describing tasks in natural language. 据介绍，Kimi Work 将 Kimi Code 已在工程场景中验证的 AI 智能体能力，迁移至面向普通知识工作者的桌面图形界面，用户无需打开终端或配置环境，通过自然语言描述任务即可驱动系统在本地输出文档、表格、PPT 等工作产物。

Kimi Work inherits professional skills (Skills) such as website building and PPT from the online version of Kimi Agent, as well as professional databases in finance, scientific research, and law. It also has a built-in Kimi WebBridge solution, supporting AI to directly operate local browsers. It can autonomously create collaborative teams containing up to 300 sub-AI agents based on task complexity. Kimi Work 继承了在线版 Kimi Agent 的建站、PPT 等专业技能（Skill），以及金融、科研、法律等专业数据库，并内置 Kimi WebBridge 方案，支持 AI 直接操作本地浏览器。最高可根据任务复杂度自主创建包含 300 个子 AI 智能体的协作团队。

item.title: Android 与 AirDrop 互通下放至更多机型
item.guid: Android-与-AirDrop-互通下放至更多机型
item.description:
According to MacRumors, Google's Quick Share has extended its interoperability with Apple's AirDrop to more Android models. 据 MacRumors 报道，Google 的 Quick Share 已把与苹果 AirDrop 互通的能力扩展到更多 Android 机型。

This new coverage includes models such as Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge, Galaxy S24 series, Galaxy Z Flip7, Z Fold7, Z Flip6, Z Fold6, Z TriFold, Honor Magic V6, OnePlus 15, as well as OPPO Find X9 series, Find N6, and vivo X300 series. Google's own devices like Pixel 10, Pixel 9, and Pixel 8a are also on the support list. 这次新增覆盖三星 Galaxy S25 Edge、Galaxy S24 系列、Galaxy Z Flip7、Z Fold7、Z Flip6、Z Fold6、Z TriFold，荣耀 Magic V6、一加 15，以及 OPPO Find X9 系列、Find N6，vivo X300 系列等机型。Google 自家的 Pixel 10、Pixel 9 和 Pixel 8a 等设备也在支持列表中。

Google also plans to bring this capability to Motorola Razr Fold 2026, OPPO Find X8 series, and Honor Magic8 Pro in the coming months. Google 还计划在未来几个月把这一能力带到 Motorola Razr Fold 2026、OPPO Find X8 系列和荣耀 Magic8 Pro。

item.title: 曝荣耀机器人手机支持 C-Log 和 LUT
item.guid: 曝荣耀机器人手机支持-C-Log-和-LUT
item.description:
According to blogger "Wangzai Baishitong," the Honor Robot Phone will be launched in the third quarter of this year, focusing on audio-visual creation. It will support AI automatic subject tracking, fully automatic camera movements, preset templates, C-Log, LUTs, as well as focus lock, white balance lock, AE lock, and camera movement data lock capabilities. 据博主「旺仔百事通」爆料，荣耀 Robot Phone 将于今年第三季度上市，主打影音创作，支持 AI 自动追踪主体、全自动运镜、预设模板、C-Log、LUTs，以及锁焦、锁白平衡、锁 AE、锁运镜数据等能力。

The leak also states that the phone's drop resistance has reached flagship levels, and its waterproofing capabilities are still being optimized. In March this year, Honor announced a strategic technical cooperation with cinema camera manufacturer ARRI at MWC 2026, stating that this cooperation would first be implemented on the Robot Phone, aiming to combine mobile imaging capabilities with cinematic photography technology. 爆料还称，这款手机的抗跌落能力已达到旗舰水平，防水能力仍在持续优化。荣耀今年 3 月曾在 MWC 2026 宣布与电影摄影机厂商 ARRI 阿莱达成战略技术合作，并称该合作将率先在 Robot Phone 上落地，目标是把移动影像能力与电影摄影技术结合。

item.title: 千问向第三方 Agent 和 Skill 开放
item.guid: 千问向第三方-Agent-和-Skill-开放
item.description:
Alibaba's Qianwen announced yesterday that it is fully open to third-party Agents and Skills, allowing enterprises to operate their own brand Agents within Qianwen and customize Agent personas and service boundaries. The first batch of test enterprises includes Luckin Coffee, KFC, Mixue Bingcheng, and China Eastern Airlines, with related services to be launched successively. 阿里千问昨日宣布向第三方 Agent、Skill 全面开放，企业可在千问中运营自己的品牌 Agent，并自定义 Agent 人设与服务边界。首批测试企业包括瑞幸咖啡、肯德基、蜜雪冰城和东方航空，相关服务将陆续上线。

The official statement says that enterprise Agents will provide product services to users in a conversational format, possessing memory and proactive planning capabilities. For example, the China Eastern Airlines Agent can recommend travel plans based on user itineraries and travel preferences; the Luckin Coffee Agent can proactively remind users that lunchtime queues are long and suggest ordering half an hour in advance. 官方称，企业 Agent 将以对话形式为用户提供产品服务，并具备记忆与主动规划能力。例如，东航 Agent 可根据用户行程计划和旅行偏好推荐出行方案；瑞幸咖啡 Agent 可主动提醒用户中午排队时间较长，建议提前半小时点单。

This opening advances Qianwen from a general chat entry point to a brand service entry point. Catering, airline, and retail brands can place services such as ordering, itineraries, benefits, and repurchase reminders into the same dialogue box, with Qianwen handling the distribution, memory, and task planning layers. 这次开放把千问从通用聊天入口推进到品牌服务入口。餐饮、航空和零售品牌可以把下单、行程、权益、复购提醒等服务放进同一个对话框中，千问则承担分发、记忆和任务规划层。

item.title: Gemma 4 12B 正式开源：性能接近 26B 模型，16GB 内存笔记本可本地运行
item.guid: Gemma-4-12B-正式开源：性能接近-26B-模型，16GB-内存笔记本可本地运行
item.description:
Google officially released Gemma 4 12B, positioned between the edge-side E4B and the 26B Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model, and it is also the first medium-scale model in the Gemma 4 series to support native audio input. Google 正式发布 Gemma 4 12B，定位介于边缘端 E4B 与 26B 混合专家模型（MoE）之间，也是 Gemma 4 系列中首个支持原生音频输入的中等规模模型。

The core design goal of Gemma 4 12B is to achieve multimodal inference on consumer-grade hardware. Official information shows that the model can run locally on laptops with just 16GB of VRAM or unified memory, while its performance on standard benchmarks is close to that of the 26B MoE model, but its total memory footprint is less than half of the latter. Gemma 4 12B 的核心设计目标是在消费级硬件上实现多模态推理。官方信息显示，该模型只需 16GB 显存或统一内存即可在笔记本电脑上本地运行，同时在标准评测基准上的表现接近 26B MoE 模型，但总内存占用不到后者的一半。

item.title: 智元开源具身交互数据集
item.guid: 智元开源具身交互数据集
item.description:
Zhiyuan yesterday open-sourced the second phase of the AGIBOT WORLD 2026 dataset, "Rich Interaction," calling it the industry's first open-source embodied dataset focused on physical interaction. 智元昨日开源 AGIBOT WORLD 2026 数据集第二期「多样交互（Rich Interaction）」，称其为行业首个聚焦物理交互的开源具身数据集。

The dataset is aimed at embodied intelligence research such as world models, neural simulators, physical perception, and representation learning, recording complex, high-density, and non-ideal interaction processes between robots and the real physical world. 数据集面向世界模型、神经仿真器、物理感知和表征学习等具身智能研究，记录机器人与真实物理世界之间复杂、高密度、非理想的交互过程。

The official statement says that this phase of the dataset aims to advance the embodied intelligence data paradigm from "learning successful actions" to "understanding complete physical distributions." It not only records successful actions but also covers friction, collisions, occlusions, errors, and non-standard interactions in real environments, allowing researchers to train models that are closer to the laws of the physical world. 官方称，本期数据集希望把具身智能数据范式从「学习成功动作」推进到「理解完整的物理分布」。它不仅记录成功动作，也覆盖真实环境中的摩擦、碰撞、遮挡、失误和非标准交互，供研究者训练更接近物理世界规律的模型。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/datasets/agibot-world/AgiBotWorld2026 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/datasets/agibot-world/AgiBotWorld2026

item.title: 名创优品回应「非会员无法买单」
item.guid: 名创优品回应「非会员无法买单」
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, multiple consumers recently reported on social media that they encountered a "non-members cannot check out" requirement when shopping at MINISO stores, and some ordinary daily necessities also required membership registration. 据界面新闻报道，近日多名消费者在社交平台反映，在名创优品门店购物时遭遇「非会员无法结账」要求，部分普通日用品也被要求注册会员。

In response, MINISO customer service stated that currently, only when purchasing blind box products is an valid membership credential required, and whether to show a membership credential for products other than trendy toys is up to the consumer's personal discretion. 对此，名创优品客服回应称，目前只有购买盲盒类产品时需要出示有效会员凭证，潮玩以外的其他产品是否出示会员凭证由消费者个人意愿决定。

Customer service also stated that if consumers encounter situations where they are asked to show membership credentials when purchasing non-trendy toy items, they can provide feedback online. In December last year, MINISO introduced a membership-based purchase limit rule to prevent scalpers from hoarding blind boxes. At that time, customer service stated that blind boxes and vinyl plush dolls were only available for purchase by MINISO members, and other product categories were not affected. 客服同时表示，如果消费者遇到购买非潮玩商品也被要求出示会员凭证的情况，可以在线上反馈。名创优品去年 12 月曾为防止黄牛囤购盲盒推出会员限购规则，客服当时称盲盒、搪胶毛绒公仔仅对名创优品会员开放购买，其他品类商品不受影响。

item.title: 义乌小商品城赴港 IPO
item.guid: 义乌小商品城赴港-IPO
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Zhejiang China Commodities City Group Co., Ltd. has submitted an application for a main board listing to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The company stated that listing in Hong Kong is a step in its global expansion, aiming to transform from an operator of the Yiwu small commodities wholesale market to an integrated international trade service provider. 据界面新闻报道，浙江中国小商品城集团股份有限公司已向港交所递交主板上市申请。公司称，赴港上市是其全球化布局的一步，目标是从义乌小商品批发市场运营方转向国际贸易综合服务商。

The prospectus discloses that from 2023 to 2025, the company's revenue will be 11.281 billion yuan, 15.475 billion yuan, and 19.707 billion yuan, respectively, and the net profit attributable to the parent company will be 2.681 billion yuan, 3.078 billion yuan, and 4.216 billion yuan, respectively. 招股书披露，2023 年至 2025 年，公司营收分别为 112.81 亿元、154.75 亿元和 197.07 亿元，归母净利润分别为 26.81 亿元、30.78 亿元和 42.16 亿元。

Yiwu International Trade City currently operates the world's largest small commodity wholesale market, with a physical market area exceeding 1.6 million square meters, approximately 80,000 merchants, covering 26 major categories and over 2 million types of goods, and has trade relations with 233 countries and regions. 小商品城目前运营全球规模最大的小商品批发市场，实体市场面积超过 160 万平方米，商户约 8 万家，商品覆盖 26 大类、200 余万种，与 233 个国家和地区存在贸易往来。

Regarding overseas expansion, as of the end of 2025, the "Yiwu International Trade City Brand Going Global" plan has deployed 78 projects in 36 countries and regions worldwide, including overseas sub-markets, self-operated and cooperative overseas warehouses, overseas exhibition halls, Yiwu Fair overseas exhibitions, and overseas national stations. 出海方面，截至 2025 年底，「小商品城品牌出海」计划已在全球 36 个国家和地区布局 78 个项目，包括海外分市场、自营及合作海外仓、海外展厅、Yiwu Fair 海外展和海外国家站。

item.title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布新海报，北美 7 月 31 日上映
item.guid: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布新海报，北美-7-月-31-日上映
item.description:
Marvel and Sony's co-produced new superhero film "Spider-Man: A Brand New Day" released a new poster yesterday. The poster shows protagonist Peter Parker alone against a New York city backdrop, with villains Scorpion and Punisher also appearing. 漫威与索尼联合出品的超级英雄新片《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》昨日发布新版海报。海报画面中，主角彼得·帕克独身置于纽约城市背景之下，反派蝎子与惩罚者也同时现身。

The film is scheduled to be released in North America on July 31, and its introduction to mainland China has been confirmed, with a release date yet to be determined. 影片定档北美 7 月 31 日上映，中国内地确认引进，待定档。

item.title: 《大鱼海棠》十周年重映定档 6 月 19 日
item.guid: 《大鱼海棠》十周年重映定档-6-月-19-日
item.description:
The official Weibo account for the animated film "Big Fish & Begonia" announced yesterday that the film's tenth-anniversary re-release is scheduled for June 19, and will premiere its IMAX 2D version. The film will also have an exclusive IMAX screening at the 28th Shanghai International Film Festival. 动画电影《大鱼海棠》官方微博昨日宣布，影片十周年重映定档 6 月 19 日，并将首次上映 IMAX 2D 版本。该片还将在第 28 届上海国际电影节进行 IMAX 独家展映。

"Big Fish & Begonia" was jointly produced by B&T Cultural, Beijing Enlight Pictures, and Horgos Coloroom Pictures, and co-directed by Liang Xuan and Zhang Chun. The film took 12 years to produce, was released in mainland China on July 8, 2016, re-released in 2020, with a cumulative box office of 575 million yuan, and currently has a Douban rating of 7.0. 《大鱼海棠》由彼岸天文化、北京光线影业、霍尔果斯彩条屋影业联合出品，梁旋、张春联合执导。影片耗时 12 年制作，2016 年 7 月 8 日在中国内地上映，2020 年曾重映，累计票房 5.75 亿元，目前豆瓣评分为 7.0。

The first part tells the story of Chun, a girl who controls the growth of begonia flowers, who resurrects the soul of a human boy named "Kun" out of gratitude, allowing him to grow into a giant fish and return to the sea, thereby triggering a series of disasters that defy the laws of the world. A teaser trailer for the second part of the film was also previously released. 第一部讲述掌管海棠花生长的少女椿，为报恩复活人类男孩「鲲」的灵魂，使其成长为巨鱼并回归大海，由此引发一连串违背世界规律的灾难。影片第二部先导预告此前也已发布。
